title: TradingView Chart Analysis
agentSetup: Single agent with browser automation and vision analysis
whatItDoes: Logs into TradingView via browser automation, captures chart screenshots, and performs technical analysis on demand. No API needed—just browser control.
financialImpact: Saves ~5 hours/week on manual chart analysis
riskControls: Analysis only, no automated execution. Human makes all trading decisions.
regulatoryNotes: N/A — analysis tool only, not executing trades
gotchas: Requires stable TradingView login session. Browser automation can be slow. Vision model may misinterpret complex charts.

title: SGX Watchlist Price Alerts
agentSetup: Single agent with cron scheduling and Telegram delivery
whatItDoes: Monitors SGX watchlist stocks every 15 minutes during trading hours. Sends Telegram alerts when price moves ±3% or volume spikes 2x average.
financialImpact: Catches 2-3 entry points/week that would have been missed
riskControls: Alerts only. No automated trading. Human verifies before acting.
gotchas: Yahoo Finance has 15-min delay for SGX. Not suitable for intraday trading. Rate limits apply.

title: Daily Market Briefing (SGX + US)
agentSetup: Single agent with cron morning trigger
whatItDoes: Every morning at 7am SGT, delivers: overnight US market summary, pre-market movers, SGX open preview, earnings today, economic calendar. Delivered via Telegram.
riskControls: Information only. No recommendations or signals.
gotchas: Web scraping can break if sites change layout. Need to handle rate limits.

title: Alpaca Paper Trading Bot
agentSetup: Single agent with Alpaca paper API integration
whatItDoes: Executes mean-reversion strategy on US stocks during market hours. Runs entirely on Alpaca paper trading. Logs all trades to Notion database.
financialImpact: Validating strategy before live deployment. No real money at risk.
riskControls: Paper trading only. Position limits enforced. Daily loss limit. Kill switch via Telegram command.
regulatoryNotes: Paper trading has no regulatory requirements. Live trading requires understanding of pattern day trader rules.
gotchas: Paper fills don't match real fills exactly. Slippage not accurately modeled. Network latency can cause issues.

title: Portfolio Performance Tracker to Notion
agentSetup: Single agent with broker API read access + Notion integration
whatItDoes: Daily at 6pm SGT, fetches portfolio holdings from multiple brokers, calculates P&L, updates Notion database with performance charts and allocation breakdown.
financialImpact: Saves 2-3 hours/week on manual tracking. Better visibility into allocation drift.
riskControls: Read-only API keys. No trading permissions. Keys stored in environment variables, not in workspace.
gotchas: API keys must be secured properly. Different brokers have different API rate limits. Currency conversion for multi-currency portfolios.

title: Multi-Agent Trading Desk (4 Agents)
agentSetup: 4 agents: Researcher → Analyst → Risk Manager → Executor with veto power
whatItDoes: Researcher scans markets for opportunities. Analyst performs deep dive on candidates. Risk Manager validates against portfolio rules. Executor places trades only if all agents approve.
financialImpact: Better risk-adjusted returns through multi-perspective validation
riskControls: Risk manager has veto power. All decisions logged. Human can override via Telegram.
infrastructure: VPS or dedicated machine (higher CPU/RAM needs)
regulatoryNotes: Same as single-agent trading. Ensure proper licensing if managing others' money.
gotchas: Higher complexity = more failure points. Agent communication can have latency. Consensus may miss fast-moving opportunities.

title: DeFi Yield Monitor
agentSetup: Single agent with Web3 API integration
whatItDoes: Monitors APY across DeFi protocols (Aave, Compound, Curve). Alerts when yield exceeds threshold or changes significantly. Tracks impermanent loss for LP positions.
financialImpact: Captures 2-5% additional yield through timely rebalancing
riskControls: Read-only wallet monitoring. No auto-compound without approval. Gas fee threshold alerts.
regulatoryNotes: DeFi regulatory status varies by jurisdiction. Singapore: MAS guidelines apply.
gotchas: Smart contract risk not assessed by agent. APY can change rapidly. Gas fees can erase yield gains.

title: Crypto DCA Bot (Binance)
agentSetup: Single agent with Binance API + cron
whatItDoes: Executes dollar-cost averaging buys on crypto weekly. Buys fixed SGD amount of BTC/ETH every Monday 9am SGT. Logs all purchases to spreadsheet.
financialImpact: Removes emotion from timing. Consistent accumulation.
riskControls: Spot only (no leverage). Small position sizes. API key with trade-only permissions (no withdrawal). IP allowlist enabled.
regulatoryNotes: Singapore: Crypto trading is legal but unregulated for individuals. MAS warnings apply. Not suitable for all investors.
gotchas: API key security is critical. Never store keys in workspace. Use environment variables. Enable 2FA on exchange account.

title: Tax-Loss Harvesting Scanner
agentSetup: Single agent with portfolio analysis logic
whatItDoes: Scans portfolio weekly for positions with unrealized losses. Identifies tax-loss harvesting opportunities. Suggests similar (not substantially identical) securities for swap.
financialImpact: Potential tax savings of $500-5000/year depending on portfolio size
riskControls: Suggestions only, no auto-execution. Wash sale rule checking. Human/tax advisor approval required.
regulatoryNotes: Tax advice disclaimer required. Wash sale rules apply (30-day window). Consult tax professional.
gotchas: Wash sale rules are complex. Similar security selection requires judgment. Tax laws vary by jurisdiction.

title: Airdrop Tracker & Eligibility Checker
whatItDoes: Tracks wallet activity across chains. Monitors for airdrop eligibility criteria (transaction count, volume, protocol usage). Alerts when new airdrops are announced.
riskControls: Read-only monitoring. No auto-interaction with contracts. Human verifies before claiming.
regulatoryNotes: Airdrops may be taxable income. Varies by jurisdiction.
gotchas: Many scam airdrops. Never connect wallet to unverified sites. Gas fees for claiming may exceed airdrop value.

title: Bull vs Bear Debate Agent
agentSetup: 3 agents: Bull Agent, Bear Agent, Arbitrator
whatItDoes: Before any trade, Bull agent argues for entry, Bear agent argues against. Arbitrator weighs both sides and makes recommendation with confidence score.
financialImpact: Reduces emotional trading. Better entry timing through contrarian analysis.
riskControls: Advisory only, no auto-execution. Human makes final decision. All arguments logged for review.
gotchas: Can lead to analysis paralysis. Both agents may be wrong. Adds latency to decision-making.

title: Weekly Investment Report Generator
agentSetup: Single agent with cron + Notion/Spreadsheet integration
whatItDoes: Every Friday at 6pm SGT, generates weekly portfolio report: P&L, top/bottom performers, allocation changes, upcoming events. Sent via Telegram and synced to Notion.
financialImpact: Saves 1-2 hours/week on manual reporting. Better tracking of performance.
riskControls: Read-only. No trading. Report is informational.
gotchas: Data formatting can be tricky. Timezone handling for international holdings.
